diagrams.title: Master Theorem Case Comparison
diagrams.description: Three cases showing relationship between f(n) and n^(log_b a)
elements: Case 1: f(n) grows slower - subproblems dominate
Case 3: f(n) grows faster - combine dominates
diagrams.purpose: Visualize which case applies based on polynomial difference

diagrams.title: Recursion Tree for T(n)=2T(n/2)+n
diagrams.description: Tree showing n work at each of log n levels
elements: Level 1: 2 nodes, n/2 work each, total n
Level 2: 4 nodes, n/4 work each, total n
Leaves: n nodes of 1 work each

diagrams.title: Binary Search Recursion Tree
diagrams.description: Tree showing halving of problem size with constant work
diagrams.purpose: Visualize logarithmic complexity from repeated halving

diagrams.title: Merge Sort Recursion Tree
diagrams.description: Balanced binary tree with merge cost at each level
elements: log n levels total, n work each
diagrams.purpose: See why merge sort achieves O(n log n)
